context:
Evaluating a Coralogix support response for this user question:

My OTTL comparison attributes["retries"] > 3 fails because retries is sometimes a string like "5". How do I safely compare numeric-looking attributes?

checklist.name: recommends-type-guards-or-conversion-before-c
checklist.description: Recommends type guards or conversion before comparison and avoids assuming all attribute values are already numeric.
